[...]: he will become poor.

[...]: he will acquire profit.

[...]: he will acquire ....

[...] ŠUB E₂ [x]

[...]: collapse of the house [...].

[...] A₂.TUKU IGI[mar]

[...]: he will experience profit.

flake 7'7'

[...] SIG₅[iq]

[...]: he will prosper.

flake 8'8'

[...] ⸢LU₂⸣ BI NU SI.⸢SA₂⸣

[...]: that man will not thrive.

flake 9'9'

[...] E₂ BI UKU₂[in]

[...]: that household will become poor.

[...] ⸢er⸣-bu KU₄[šu₂]

[...]: income will arrive for him.

[... ḫa]-šaḫ  ; ⸢ŠE⸣

[...]: need of barley.

flake 12'12'

[...] ⸢ina⸣-an-[ziq]

[...]: he will be annoyed.

flake 13'13'

[...] iḫ-ḫa-⸢šaḫ⸣

[...] will be needed.

[...] TUKU[ši]

[...]: he will acquire [...].

[...] ⸢LU₂⸣ [...]

[...] man [...].
